Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.SchemaBuilder

  • Packages that use SchemaBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

    • Uses of SchemaBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return SchemaBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      SchemaBuilder TypeBuilder.and()
      Sets the built Type instance as the type in the parent builder.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withDescription​(String description)
      Sets the description for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withEnumValue​(String enumValue)
      Adds an enum value to the list of enum values for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withFormat​(String format)
      Sets the format for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withItems()
      Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the schema for array items.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withItems​(Schema items)
      Sets the schema for the items in an array schema.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withNullable​(Boolean nullable)
      Sets the nullable flag for the schema.
      SchemaBuilder FunctionDeclarationBuilder.withParameters()
      Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the function parameters.
      SchemaBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withResponseSchema()
      Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the response schema.
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withType​(Type type)
      Sets the type for the schema.
      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder with parameters of type SchemaBuilder 
      Constructor Description
      SchemaBuilder​(SchemaBuilder schemaBuilder)
      Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by another SchemaBuilder (for nested items).
      TypeBuilder​(SchemaBuilder schemaBuilder)
      Constructor for the TypeBuilder.
